query: CREATE TABLE `recurring_tasks` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `clientId` int NOT NULL, `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `description` text, `taskType` enum('DAS','NFS','DCTF','SPED','OUTROS') NOT NULL, `dueDayOfMonth` int NOT NULL, `active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `recurring_tasks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
